Petition For Instructions; Objection To Probate Referee Valuation
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Ritzi K. Lam, for Mary Ma Wong, Petitioner.
Byron Sun, for Amy Liu, Objector.
Lillian Ng, for and with Barbara Simon, Personal Representative.

At the outset, the court discloses the relation of probate Referee assigned to this matter to this court's general counsel. No objections are presented. The court and Ms. Lam briefly discuss the notice issue. Counsel then presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the status of this matter specifically, but not limited to, the probate referee's valuation of the estate property. The court queries counsel regarding the possibility of the parties engaging in the court's pro bono mediation program. After discussion regarding the preceding, the Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation - counsel is instructed to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order. Mediation must be completed no later than Mar-18-2026. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Apr-06-2026. The subject matter is continued to Apr-13-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204. The Parties are to return on the same date for status of mediation.

The Probate Status Report currently set in this matter for Feb-23-2026 is continued to Apr-13-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 206.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Robles. Not Reported.
